requirement_topic.en: 50 Hz Grid Settings and Protection Windows
requirement_topic.zh: 50 Hz 电网设置与保护窗口
requirement_topic.zht: 50 Hz 電網設定與保護窗口

summary.en: Oman operates on a nominal 50 Hz power system. For PV inverters, the compliance issue is not only the nominal frequency, but the utility-approved frequency and voltage trip windows, ride-through behavior, reconnection timing, ramp rates, power-factor or reactive-power settings, and commissioning evidence required by OPWP, OETC, Nama, the distribution company, or the project owner.
summary.zh: 阿曼电力系统采用标称 50 Hz。对于光伏逆变器，合规问题不只是标称频率，还包括 OPWP、OETC、Nama、配电公司或项目业主批准的频率和电压跳闸窗口、穿越行为、重连时间、爬坡率、功率因数或无功设置以及调试证据。
summary.zht: 阿曼電力系統採用標稱 50 Hz。對於光伏逆變器，合規問題不只是標稱頻率，還包括 OPWP、OETC、Nama、配電公司或專案業主批准的頻率和電壓跳閘窗口、穿越行為、重連時間、爬坡率、功率因數或無功設定以及調試證據。

standards_or_laws: Oman grid-code and connection requirements for voltage and frequency behavior
OPWP / OETC / Nama project-specific protection and operating settings
Distribution-company commissioning settings for rooftop or distribution-connected PV

summary.en: China also uses nominal 50 Hz grids, and Chinese PV inverter reports commonly include 50 Hz operating data under GB/T 19964-2024, GB/T 37408-2019, and NB/T 32004-2018. That overlap does not prove that Oman trip windows, reconnection behavior, or project-specific settings are loaded.
summary.zh: 中国同样采用标称 50 Hz 电网，中国光伏逆变器报告通常包含 GB/T 19964-2024、GB/T 37408-2019 和 NB/T 32004-2018 下的 50 Hz 运行数据。该重合不能证明已加载阿曼跳闸窗口、重连行为或项目特定参数。
summary.zht: 中國同樣採用標稱 50 Hz 電網，中國光伏逆變器報告通常包含 GB/T 19964-2024、GB/T 37408-2019 和 NB/T 32004-2018 下的 50 Hz 運行資料。該重合不能證明已載入阿曼跳閘窗口、重連行為或專案特定參數。

gap.en: Provide a firmware-country profile, password or lock-control procedure, grid-setting export, factory default comparison, site commissioning record, and evidence that the installed inverter matches the Oman-approved voltage and frequency protection profile.
gap.zh: 应提供固件国家配置、密码或锁定控制程序、电网参数导出、出厂默认值对比、现场调试记录，以及已安装逆变器匹配阿曼批准电压和频率保护配置的证据。
gap.zht: 應提供韌體國家配置、密碼或鎖定控制程序、電網參數匯出、出廠預設值對比、現場調試記錄，以及已安裝逆變器匹配阿曼批准電壓和頻率保護配置的證據。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where required by OPWP, OETC, Nama, distribution-company, Sahim, project-owner, commissioning, or grid-connection approval
mandatory_status.cn: China 50 Hz test evidence is only a baseline and does not replace Oman-approved protection settings

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] 50 Hz compatibility is necessary but not enough. Confirm Oman-approved protection windows, firmware profile, and commissioning records for the actual project.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 50 Hz 兼容是必要条件但并不足够。应确认实际项目的阿曼批准保护窗口、固件配置和调试记录。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 50 Hz 相容是必要條件但並不足夠。應確認實際專案的阿曼批准保護窗口、韌體配置和調試記錄。
